title: Inspect repo docs/skills alignment for note-lead short-teaser policy after runtime exemption. Focus only on these files in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public: skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md, docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md, docs/x-auto-note-linking-rule.md. Report exact lines or wording...
summary_text: ### Current test/contract coverage (no file changes made) - In `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_approval_guard.py`, citation gating is covered for: - quantitative/medical-claim text with no source URL - research/evidence claim text with bad sources (`note.com`, `x.com`/`twitter.com`) - a few positive/negative combinations by category and source type - In `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_prepare_post_bundle.py`, there is coverage at post-prepare level for research/evidence claims with `note.com` source. - In `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_generate_draft_candidates.py`, gating is covered for source-type rejection patterns, but not for “conceptual medical/AI-diagnostic with no source URL.” - In `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_scheduler_gate1.py`, coverage is about image/thumbnail gating, not citation-required source gating. - In `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-xauto-draft-only.sh`, there is blocked-candidate accounting (`missing-non-x-primary-source`) exercised, but not tied to medical/diagnostic conceptual content fixtures. - In `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-x-auto-skill-contract.sh`, contract checks are mostly doc-presence/phrase assertions and do not currently encode a specific “medical/AI-diagnostic conceptual requires non-x primary source” rule. ### Minimal regression tests to add 1. Add a unit test in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_approval_guard.py`: - Input: category like `医療AIニュース/論文解説` or equivalent `AI診断`/`医療AI` bucket, concept-only medical/diagnostic explanatory text (no explicit `%`, `率`, `RCT`, etc.), no `source_url`. - Assert: `allowed is False` and blocker includes the citation-required reason. - This directly locks the new policy in `evaluate_post`-level guard behavior. 2. Add a candidate-level regression in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/x-auto/tests/test_generate_draft_candidates.py`: - Create a draft candidate matching the same medical/AI-diagnostic conceptual pattern with empty `source_url`. - Assert the candidate is filtered as blocked and reason includes `missing-non-x-primary-source` (or equivalent canonical blocker if that contract uses a specific key). 3. Add an end-to-end-ish path test in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-xauto-draft-only.sh`: - Seed a conceptual medical/diagnostic post fixture with no primary-source URL. - Assert blocked aggregate includes the non-x-primary-source reason and that blocked count increases. 4. Optional but recommended contract assertion in `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-x-auto-skill-contract.sh`: - Assert docs explicitly state this category-level rule, not just generic numeric/research claim phrasing. ### Repo-visible docs/tests likely needing change first - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/x-auto-contract.md` - Add explicit policy wording that medical/AI-diagnostic conceptual posts require a primary-source URL (not optional unless explicitly exempted). - `/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/skills/x-auto-post-guard/SKILL.md` - Align policy examples/checklist language with the same rule so implementation and skill guidance stay in sync. - After documentation change, add/update contract assertion in `test-x-auto-skill-contract.sh` so it fails when docs diverge from actual behavior. If you want, I can draft the exact test bodies next as copy-ready snippets (still without applying them).
